name: Setup Forge
description: Initialize forge environment — detect tools and set capability tier (Quick/Forge/Forge+/Deep)

name: Analyze Source
description: Discover what to skill in a large repo — produces recommended skill briefs

name: Brief Skill
description: Design a skill scope through guided discovery

name: Create Skill
description: Compile a skill from a brief — supports --batch for multiple briefs

name: Quick Skill
description: Fast skill from a package name or GitHub URL — no brief needed

name: Stack Skill
description: Consolidated project stack skill with integration patterns — code-mode (analyzes manifests) or compose-mode (synthesizes from existing skills + architecture doc)

name: Update Skill
description: Smart regeneration preserving [MANUAL] sections after source changes

name: Audit Skill
description: Drift detection between skill and current source code

name: Test Skill
description: Cognitive completeness verification — quality gate before export

name: Export Skill
description: Package for distribution and inject context into CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/.cursorrules

name: Verify Stack
description: Pre-code stack feasibility verification against architecture and PRD documents

name: Refine Architecture
description: Improve architecture doc using verified skill data and VS feasibility findings

name: Workflow Status
description: Show current lifecycle position, active skill briefs, and forge tier status

name: Knowledge Index
description: Cross-cutting principles and patterns — JiT loaded by workflows via index lookup
